children.text:
Project management and knowledge
management for teams and agents

Plane brings projects, docs, and AI-powered workflows into one unified
workspace so teams and agents can plan, execute, and stay aligned.

Four products in one workspace
for your whole org
Project management that matches how your team works
Initiatives set the direction. Projects, epics, and cycles break it down. Progress connects across every layer.
Documentation built in for tribal knowledge
Company knowledge in one place. Tied to the work that created it. Never stale, never lost.
AI that knows your work, not just your prompts
Assign agents to work items. Summarize progress across projects. Triage, draft, and act using the full context of your workspace.
Customer support that lives where your work does
Turn requests into trackable work items. Route to the right team and close the loop automatically.
Why FortyAU replaced Monday and Trello with Plane for flexible, self-hosted project delivery
The Plane team is creating a product that our business has been needing for years. Modern features, flexible workflows, without sacrificing
Why MinimalArt replaced ClickUp with Plane for simpler project management
Why VATES replaced a Trello alternative with Plane as they scaled
How INITS built a real-world innovation lab for students with Plane
AI that works because it knows your context

Plane was not retrofitted for AI, it was built around it. Plane AI reads across every project, cycle, doc, and
thread in your workspace. Age
Ask Plane AI anything. Status on a cycle, blockers on a project, what changed in a doc last week. It reads across your complete workspace.
2. Agents that do the work for you
Built-in agents handle the busywork. Triage incoming requests, assign owners, track blockers, and ship updates automatically.
3. Works where your team already talks
Bring Plane AI into Slack or Teams. Turn conversations into work items, get updates, and keep projects moving without switching tools.
Ask Plane AI anything. Status on a cycle, blockers on a project, what changed in a doc last week. It reads across your complete workspace.
Agents that do the work for you
Built-in agents handle the busywork. Triage incoming requests, assign owners, track blockers, and ship updates automatically.
Works where your team already talks
Bring Plane AI into Slack or Teams. Turn conversations into work items, get updates, and keep projects moving without switching tools.

Two Fortune 10 companies
 chose Plane for their Jira migration.

Get out of Jira, Linear, ClickUp, Asana, or Monday without leaving your data behind.
Full migration support from day one, whether you're mov
We run discovery scripts on your existing setup
We map every issue, attachment, comment, and automation
You get a migration plan tailored to your organization
Define workflows that match how your team actually works
Connect to Slack, GitHub, Figma, and 50+ tools
Set up initiatives, cycles, and team structures
Experience a tool that moves as fast as you do
AI already knows your projects, your blockers, your priorities
No more fighting your software to get work done

Flexible features for every
project, and all teams

Plane is fast to set-up and easy-to-adapt.
Multiple views, time-boxed cycles, built-in docs, and real-time dashboards help teams plan and sh
Board, Spreadsheet, List, Gantt. Switch instantly. Every role sees the work that matters to them.
Track cycle velocity, workload, blockers, and scope changes with dashboards that populate automatically. No manual reports, no Friday status
Time-box work with velocity tracking and burndown charts built in
Rich documentation features that live alongside projects
Align team-level work to org-level goals with rollup tracking
Automate handoffs, reviews, and stage gates without plugins

Self-host without compromise,
on-prem and air-gapped
The only modern project management platform built for environments where you control every layer.
Install, configure, upgrade, back up, and monitor your instance with single commands. Multi-instance support, custom domain setup, and servi
Deploy with Docker for quick setup or Kubernetes with Helm charts for production scale. Bring your own Postgres, Redis, and S3-compatible st
One admin panel for your entire instance. Configure SMTP, authentication methods, SSO, workspace security, and telemetry preferences from a

Your entire workspace on your mobile
on both our Cloud and your
self-hosted instance

Extend Plane with apps, agents,
and your own integrations
GitHub, GitLab, Slack, Sentry, and more. Sync issues, track PRs, and import from Jira, Linear, Asana, ClickUp or Monday.
Open API, webhooks, OAuth apps, and a native MCP server. Build custom integrations or AI agents that work inside Plane.
Don’t miss our AGI-like Slack integration.
in any Slack channel. Describe what needs to happen. Plane creates the work, assigns it, and syncs the thread back.
Plane meets the security and compliance standards your InfoSec team requires, across cloud and self-hosted deployments.
SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, and CCPA compliance out of the box. Independently audited, continuously monitored.
Automatic backups, real-time scaling, and multi-layer failovers. Built to stay up when it matters most.
Identity and access at every layer
SSO, SAML, and LDAP across every workspace. Authenticate your way.
LOVED BY DEVELOPERS AND PROJECTOPS ADMINS

Every setting versioned, reviewed, and
deployed from your terminal.

Define projects in YAML, version in Git, deploy from your terminal. Start
treating project configuration as the infrastructure it is.
REST API with OAuth 2.0, HMAC-signed webhooks, and typed SDKs in Node.js and Python. Build custom integrations, dashboards, and automations.
Native MCP server, an agent framework with @mention support, and full Agent Run lifecycle tracking. Let AI manage work inside Plane, not jus
With your consent, we use cookies to optimize performance and enable functions on this site.
